# Production readiness status & roadmap

**Last updated:** generated by `make production-score` → `logs/production_readiness_scorecard.md`

## Executive summary

| Milestone | Target % | Typical meaning |
|-----------|----------|-----------------|
| **Overall (weighted)** | Run scorecard | Blended across code, infra, security, ops |
| **P0 go-live** | **85%** | Citadel running: backend, auth, gateway, void, AI, observability |
| **Full platform (43 entities)** | **95%** | All locations, P3 workers, CF retired, UAT signed off |

The repo is **code-ready for P0**; the largest gap is **live Citadel execution** (secrets, Vault unseal, DNS to Traefik).

---

## Dimension breakdown

### 1. CI & automated tests (~90%)

**Done**

- Production gate: smoke, knowledge brain, gbrain, canonical routes, entity/orchestrator, adaptive, startup readiness, compose contracts, penetration, zero-cost audit
- Forgejo: `production-gate.yml`, `citadel-preflight.yml`, `security-scan.yml`, `dependency-audit.yml`

**Remaining**

- Full `pytest tests/` on nightly (slow/integration)
- Workshop runner confirmation after each `main` push

---

### 2. P0 core platform (~82%)

**Done**

- `api.py`: startup validator, `/ready` 503 until bootstrap, adaptive + proactive orchestrator
- The Spark (MCP), Digital Grid hooks, RBAC on admin routes
- Workers: `tranc3-backend`, `tranc3-ai`, `infinity-void`, `api-gateway`, `infinity-ws`, `infinity-auth`, `infinity-ai`

**Remaining**

- Live load test on Citadel (`make test-load` against real URL)
- RS256 JWT keys in production (`JWT_PRIVATE_KEY` / `JWT_PUBLIC_KEY`)

---

### 3. Worker fleet (~70–85%)

**Done**

- 50+ `workers/*/worker.py` implementations
- Entity blocks on `/health`, shared `admin-data` for overrides

**Remaining**

- P3 stubs in `docker-compose.production.yml` (analytics, geo, SMS, etc.) — marked TODO
- Per-worker domain CRUD where still stub-only

---

### 4. Production infrastructure / Citadel (~70%)

**Done**

- `docker-compose.production.yml`: Traefik, Vault file config, Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, IPFS, NATS, Tempo
- `tranc3-backend` service, gateway upstream env vars
- `deploy/citadel/deploy-production.sh`, `scripts/citadel_preflight.py`, `deploy/vault/init-citadel.sh`

**Remaining (operator)**

```bash
cp .env.production.example .env.production   # fill from Vault
make citadel-preflight
./deploy/vault/init-citadel.sh                 # first time only
make deploy-citadel
make monitor                                   # P0 health
```

---

### 5. Security & dependencies (~75%)

**Done**

- Penetration test suite, bandit/semgrep/gitleaks in Forgejo
- No default JWT on gateway in production; vault-service requires `VAULT_MASTER_KEY` in prod
- `scripts/dependency_audit.py`

**Remaining**

- Pin any unpinned packages in `requirements.txt`
- Resolve pip-audit findings on CI runner (`pip install pip-audit`)
- Set `AUDIT_SIGNING_KEY` for Observatory audit ledger

---

### 6. Observability (~72%)

**Done**

- Prometheus/Grafana/Loki stack in compose
- W3C tracing module, health aggregator worker

**Remaining**

- Dashboards provisioned for all P0 targets
- Alert rules wired to notifications worker

---

### 7. UX / Infinity Admin OS (~78%)

**Done**

- `/dashboard`, Infinity Admin OS (taskbar + Start menu), ARIA on main dashboard + login/chat
- Admin OS tiles: entities, orchestrators, health, adaptive, swarm

**Remaining**

- `web/` Arcadia app E2E and design parity with Fabulousa
- Full keyboard audit on `dashboard/app.js`

---

### 8. Zero-cost policy (~90%)

**Done**

- `docs/ZERO_COST_VENDOR_MATRIX.md`, `config/zero_cost/providers.yaml`, adaptive rotator excludes paid chains

**Remaining**

- Document any Conditional cloud keys if enabled

---

### 9. Legacy Cloudflare decommission (~35%)

**Done**

- Self-hosted replacements for P0/P1 workers in repo

**Remaining**

- Point `api.trancendos.com` only to Traefik
- Retire CF workers per `CF_WORKER_MIGRATION_ROADMAP.md`

---

### 10. Live ops executed (~15–45%)

**Done**

- Automation scripts only (no production host in CI)

**Remaining**

- Production `.env.production` on Citadel (never commit)
- Close superseded PRs #84–89: `make pr-hygiene-apply`

---

## Phased roadmap to 85% (P0 go-live)

| Week | Focus | Exit criteria |
|------|--------|----------------|
| **W0** | CI + scorecard | `make production-score` ≥ 75%; production-gate green |
| **W1** | Citadel deploy | All P0 `/health` 200; Vault unsealed |
| **W2** | Security | pip-audit 0 HIGH; dependency-audit workflow green |
| **W3** | Routing | Traefik TLS; CF workers disabled for migrated routes |
| **W4** | UAT | `tests/test_uat.py` against staging URL; entity renames verified |

## Phased roadmap to 95% (full platform)

| Phase | Focus |
|-------|--------|
| P3 workers | Implement or remove stubs from compose |
| Infinity routing | Portal → Gate → role-based locations |
| Locations | Library, Academy, Town Hall per `PLATFORM_ENTITIES.md` |
| Split repos | Location extraction when templates stable |

---

## Commands

```bash
make production-score      # % scorecard → logs/
make citadel-preflight     # pre-deploy checks
make branch-audit          # remote branch integration report
make dependency-audit      # pip-audit + pin warnings
make deploy-citadel        # on Citadel host only
```

See also: `docs/PRODUCTION_ROADMAP.md` (phase checklist), `docs/BRANCH_INTEGRATION_REPORT.md`.
